faqs.question: How do I choose the right Aurasemi solution for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Aurasemi solution depends on your application requirements: (1) For 5G base station timing - choose 5G Timing Solution with AU5425 clock generator and AU5411 buffers; (2) For data center server power - choose Server Power Management Solution with AU80xx VRM controllers; (3) For automotive ADAS - choose Automotive Sensor Solution with AEC-Q100 qualified AU90xx sensors; (4) For IoT connectivity - choose IoT Wireless Solution with AU48xx RF front-end. Consider factors like performance requirements, temperature range, certification needs, and cost constraints. Contact LiTong FAE for personalized recommendations.
faqs.decisionGuide: Match solution to application requirements. Contact FAE for guidance.

faqs.question: What support does LiTong provide for Aurasemi solutions?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive support for Aurasemi solutions: (1) Technical consultation - helping select the right components for your application; (2) Application engineering - supporting schematic design, PCB layout, and system integration; (3) Reference designs - providing proven design examples and evaluation boards; (4) Quality support - handling RMA processes and quality issues; (5) Design-in support - providing technical documentation and application notes; (6) Long-term supply - ensuring stable supply for production programs. Our FAE team has deep expertise in analog IC applications across networking, automotive, and industrial markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: LiTong provides end-to-end support from design to production for Aurasemi solutions.

faqs.question: Can Aurasemi provide custom IC solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Aurasemi offers custom IC solutions for specific application requirements: (1) Custom clock configurations - tailored frequency plans and output configurations; (2) Special voltage options - non-standard supply voltages for specific systems; (3) Extended temperature range - beyond standard specifications; (4) Custom packaging - special form factors for space-constrained designs; (5) Special testing - additional screening or burn-in requirements; (6) Long-term supply - guaranteed availability for 5-10 years. Custom solutions require minimum order quantities and development lead times. Contact LiTong to discuss your specific requirements and feasibility.
faqs.decisionGuide: Custom solutions available for volume applications. Contact LiTong to discuss requirements.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Aurasemi products?
faqs.answer: Aurasemi product lead times vary by product type and order volume: (1) Standard products - typically 4-6 weeks for common parts; (2) High-volume orders - may require 6-8 weeks depending on capacity; (3) New products - first samples may take 8-12 weeks; (4) Automotive qualified parts - typically 6-8 weeks with full traceability. LiTong maintains strategic inventory for high-demand Aurasemi products to support urgent requirements. For critical projects, we recommend forecasting and buffer stock arrangements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard products 4-6 weeks, special products 6-8 weeks. Contact sales for specific lead times.

faqs.question: Does Aurasemi offer sample programs for evaluation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Aurasemi offers sample programs for evaluation purposes: (1) Free samples - available for qualified commercial customers with valid projects; (2) Sample types - standard products for functional evaluation; (3) Lead time - typically 1-2 weeks for standard samples; (4) Quantity - usually 5-10 pieces per part number for initial evaluation; (5) Support - technical documentation and FAE support included with samples; (6) Evaluation boards - available for clock and power management products. Contact LiTong sales with your project details to request samples.
faqs.decisionGuide: Free samples available for qualified projects. Contact LiTong sales to request evaluation samples.

solutions.name: 5G Base Station Timing Solution
solutions.title: Aurasemi 5G Base Station Timing Solution
solutions.subtitle: Ultra-low jitter clocking solution for 5G NR base stations and small cells
solutions.description: Complete timing solution featuring Aurasemi clock generators and buffers optimized for 5G NR base station applications with <100fs jitter performance.
solutions.longDescription: Aurasemi's 5G Base Station Timing Solution provides a comprehensive clocking architecture for 5G NR infrastructure. The solution features the AU5425 ultra-low jitter clock generator as the primary timing source, delivering <100fs RMS jitter essential for high-speed SerDes in 5G baseband processors. Multiple AU5411 clock buffers distribute low-jitter clocks to RF transceivers, baseband processors, and synchronization circuits. The solution supports both TDD and FDD operation modes with flexible frequency planning. LiTong provides complete design support including reference schematics, PCB layout guidelines, and clock tree analysis.

faqs.question: What jitter performance is required for 5G applications?
faqs.answer: 5G applications have stringent jitter requirements: (1) 5G NR baseband processors with 100G SerDes typically require <200fs RMS jitter; (2) High-performance systems may need <100fs for optimal BER; (3) RF ADC/DAC clocking usually requires <500fs depending on signal bandwidth; (4) Synchronization circuits need <1ps for proper TDD operation. The Aurasemi AU5425 with <100fs jitter provides margin for these requirements. When designing your clock tree, budget jitter carefully - the total jitter at the end point includes clock source jitter, buffer additive jitter, and noise coupling. A good rule of thumb is to budget 70% of your total jitter allowance for the clock source and buffers.

faqs.question: How do I synchronize multiple 5G radios?
faqs.answer: Synchronizing multiple 5G radios requires: (1) Common reference clock - distribute the same clock source to all radios using low-skew buffers like AU5411; (2) Phase alignment - use deterministic clock start features to align clock phases; (3) Frame timing - implement PPS (pulse per second) or IEEE 1588 PTP for frame synchronization; (4) Cable compensation - account for propagation delays in clock distribution cables; (5) Temperature tracking - monitor and compensate for temperature-induced phase variations. The Aurasemi solution provides synchronous output enable and deterministic startup features that help achieve phase alignment. For massive MIMO systems, clock skew between channels should be kept below 100ps to maintain beamforming accuracy.

faeInsights.author: Michael Chen
faeInsights.title: Senior FAE - RF & Communication
faeInsights.summary: Proper clock design is critical for 5G system performance and compliance.
faeInsights.content: In my experience supporting numerous 5G base station designs, clocking is often underestimated but absolutely critical. The Aurasemi AU5425/AU5411 combination provides an excellent balance of performance and cost for 5G applications. I've seen designs achieve sub-100fs jitter with proper implementation. Key considerations include: power supply noise (use dedicated LDOs), PCB layout (differential routing with proper impedance control), and shielding (keep clocks away from RF power amplifiers). For massive MIMO systems, pay special attention to clock distribution symmetry - any skew translates directly to beam steering errors. I always recommend measuring actual jitter on the first prototypes and iterating if needed.
faeInsights.insight: Clock jitter directly impacts 5G system capacity and coverage.
faeInsights.logic: Higher jitter increases SerDes BER, reducing effective throughput and requiring higher SNR margins.
keyTakeaways: Use dedicated LDO for PLL power supply
bestPractices: Use Clock Architect software for design
